candidates.why: Current borrowings line directly under current liabilities; captures short-term borrowings.

Tax asset/receivable, opposite of taxes payable.

candidates.why: This is the tangible fixed assets/PPE line and best match for property, plant and equipment.

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist because the shortlist only contained intangible-asset rows. 'Equipment, Tools and Installations' is the clear PPE line.
